utility_evaluation.REASONING:
First, count the number of items in the required format: there are 5 items — health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Next, check the final coverage plan: it includes all 5 items. Then verify if each is fully specified according to what should be covered. 
- health_coverage: includes description mentioning physical and mental health insurance and has both monthly and annual costs — fully specified.
- property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with monthly and annual costs — fully specified.
- travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with description and monthly/annual costs — fully specified.
- additional_services: includes description and costs — meets requirement.
- total_budget: includes complete monthly/annual cost breakdown — fully specified. All items are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: First, identify the items in the final coverage plan and match them to the ground-truth ratings. The health_coverage description is 'LifeFirst Standard Plan (Physical Health + Mental Health + Preventive Care Package Add-on)'. This means we combine LifeFirst Standard Plan (Physical Health) rating 9, LifeFirst Standard Plan (Mental Health) rating 9, and Preventive Care Package rating 7. The property_coverage description is 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage (Home Content Insurance)', which matches LifeFirst Standard Coverage under home_content with rating 9. The travel_coverage description is 'LifeFirst Standard Plan (Travel Insurance + 24/7 Travel Assistance Add-on)', which matches LifeFirst Standard Plan (Travel Insurance) rating 9 and 24/7 Travel Assistance rating 4.
